{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041805050FE87F25631090B567"}"},"total":226},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579269776521642814","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"1/59章一口气看完！这是一本没有任何外挂的小说，主角纯靠自己修炼变强。就是主角是个别扭的人，喜欢这些美女，却又不敢收了她们。色字当头，却最后怂了，扣一星！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764738262,"group_id":"7559104193592560702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看了快20年的小说了。居然一直有人以为我是水军，哈哈哈哈！笑死哥！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8lG/qChvJ74SjzEb53NnlPgC1R6zeFtVFFGZKROMltl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2933925530044207","user_name":"神农尝百亿小说"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2933925530044207","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7559104193592560702","book_info":{"abstract":"【稳健流+无系统+无阴谋论】
现在站在你面前的是——
天庭缔造者、三界至高主宰、洪荒第一强者、万族救世主……
回想起当初巫族横行霸道，洪荒万族饱受欺压，齐聚蓬莱，请求他登临天帝尊位，
伏羲道：
“陛下，天冷了，加件衣服吧。”
东华无奈长叹，
“唉，”
“你们害苦了朕啊，朕真没想当天帝啊！”
本书又名：《男仙之首狗都不当》、《人在洪荒，老婆孩子热炕头》、《论如何成为天道最宠爱的崽》……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c6e92e172682ba233afb58e412235361","author":"沉默先生","author_id":"","book_id":"7559104193592560702","book_name":"洪荒：稳健不出，鸿钧急哭了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7559827685053055550","read_count":"77773","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"627840"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"306","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,洪荒,奇幻仙侠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/32b92b97ed010ea036f57863ce76a56c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308285&x-signature=AkXHXMbHAyc8vleSN%2FUoyT4I07M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3359699905032319","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"58"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041805050FE87F25631090B567"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":38,"f
